g.text: Nantuo-Doushantuo Transition — Snowball Earth Cap Carbonate
岩 性 描 述
Black shale with large acanthomorphic acritarchs
Pale grey microcrystalline dolomite with tepee structures (lower cap)
Green-grey massive diamictite with striated clasts
Dark grey sandy diamictite with dropstones
Nantuo-Doushantuo Transition — Snowball Earth Cap Carbonate | 总厚 509m | 8 层 | 比例尺 1:2,003
